name: DANDY’S TALE
description:
Credit to Harveey.sh on TikTok for da idea and premise

In this you play as frisk but as whatever Dandys world character is available for it

Characters that have roles already:

Toriel:Shelly

Asgore:Astro

Papyrus:Goob

Sans:Scraps

Undyne:Sprout

Alphys:cosmo

Chara:shrimpo

Asriel:Looey

Flowey:Dandy (obviously)

Metatton phase one:Vee

Metatton phase two: Glisten

And frisk: you decide as it’s you!

P.S it may refer to your character as a child I have no clue why it does that you might just have to deal with it.

IF YOU HAVE ANY REQUESTS I’D BE HAPPY TO DO IT IF YOU’D LIKE.
creator: Samley_youtuber_fan
